title: BH | 15 Litres Galvanized Mop Bucket | Cleaning Mop With Metal Stick - 1.2m | Extra Refill Free | Adjustable | Durable | Super Absorbent | Ideal for Home,Kitchen,Bathroom,Office - By BEST HOUSE
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: 1 X Galvanized Mop Bucket, 2 Mop Head and 1.2m Foldable Stick. Stick comes in 3 parts which is easy to assemble.

360° SWIVEL HEAD: This provides easy manoeuvrability. The 360-degree rotating mop head makes it simple to clean around furniture, corners, and hard-to-reach areas. Effortlessly glide the mop over floors for smooth and efficient cleaning.

SUITABLE FOR ALL FLOOR TYPES: Hardwood floors, tile, laminate, or vinyl, this cleaning mop is versatile enough to tackle all types of floors. Ideal for cleaning kitchens, bathrooms, offices, and more. The mop refill can be used wet or dry. They are lightweight and washable making them ideal cleaning mops for floors for a long period of time.
ADJUSTABLE & ERGONOMIC HANDLE: These set comes with a sturdy Metal 120cm long mop stick, the perfect length to prevent the need to bend over when cleaning the floors.
STURDY AND LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN : Made from super absorbent, yet lightweight Natural Cotton-Synthetic Blended Yarn. The sturdy design ensures long last performance without the bulk of heavier mops.
VERSATILE USE: Whether you need a home cleaning, office flor cleaner, or a commercial-grade mop, this is perfect for Domestic and Commercial Cleaning
These Mop Bucket has a capacity of 15 litre and is made from strong galvanised metal for a longer life. This traditional looking mop bucket is perfect for domestic or industrial use.
This traditional mop bucket is still very popular today as it offers strength, durability and style with the galvanised steel design.
